description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard parcel box, featuring printed red text and graphics on its brown kraft surface. The box displays shipping and handling information, including a weight limit of 15 kg and dimensions of 60 x 35 x 28 cm, as well as a barcode and QR code for tracking. Prominently, the sides are marked with a bold red logo consisting of four arrows pointing outward from a central point, and Cyrillic text indicating delivery service branding. The box is fully sealed with visible flaps on the top, suggesting it is ready for transport or storage. The surface is matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard, and the box appears sturdy enough to support moderate stacking. This parcel is commonly seen in urban logistics, courier services, or on doorsteps awaiting collection.
description: A large, brown cardboard parcel box with red delivery service branding, shipping details, and a bold arrow logo on its sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the parcel's shipping details, barcode, QR code, and weight/dimension information printed in red on the brown cardboard.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the large red arrow logo and Cyrillic delivery text, with no shipping details visible.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the front, again showing shipping details, barcode, and QR code, but with the text orientation reversed.
description_view_3: This side view displays the red arrow logo and Cyrillic text, similar to view 1, with no additional shipping details.
